title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: shim bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for shim is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The shim package contains a first-stage UEFI boot loader that handles chaining to a trusted full boot loader under secure boot environments.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): shim 8_10 release needs to be bumped to match 8_9 to fix broken update path (JIRA:RHEL-113358)  Leapp IPU 8.10>9.7 fails due to an invalid signature for the kernel (JIRA:RHEL-126741)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64

fixes.description: shim 8_10 release needs to be bumped to match 8_9 to fix broken update path
Leapp IPU 8.10>9.7 fails due to an invalid signature for the kernel

full_text:
An update for shim is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The shim package contains a first-stage UEFI boot loader that handles chaining to a trusted full boot loader under secure boot environments.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): shim 8_10 release needs to be bumped to match 8_9 to fix broken update path (JIRA:RHEL-113358)  Leapp IPU 8.10>9.7 fails due to an invalid signature for the kernel (JIRA:RHEL-126741)
